thresholds.rationale: Initial floor below the first local native smoke measurement for the tiny fixed-board legal action tree.
Initial floor below the first local native full-report measurement for validation plus placement application.
Initial floor below the first local native full-report measurement for Rust-projected board view generation.
Initial floor for board-aware replay step projection.
Initial floor below the first local native full-report measurement for public-view serialization round trips.
Initial floor below the first local native full-report measurement for deterministic five-command win replay.

First local native full report measured below the visible Stage 2 Three Marks 300,000+ games/sec target. This provisional floor is not a target change; GAT4THRMARBOA-015 must document the miss and any accepted recalibration requires ADR discipline.
Initial floor below the first local native full-report measurement for seeded random legal selection from the starting action tree.
Initial floor below the first local native full-report measurement for deterministic priority-policy selection from the starting board.
